monitor_the_situation.title: US Launches Retaliatory Strikes on Bushehr and Kangan, Iran
US Attacks Iran in Strait of Hormuz
— S3 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 10m ago. US military launches strikes against Iranian targets in the Strait of Hormuz in retaliation for Iran's attack on a commercial vessel.
Iran Fires Warning Shot, Closes Strait of Hormuz
Iran Closes Strait of Hormuz After Striking Cargo Ship With Missile
— S3 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 1h ago. Iran's IRGC Navy struck a commercial cargo ship with a missile and closed the Strait of Hormuz, a vital oil chokepoint, dramatically escalating tensions.
